moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale wrapped up yesterday, July 19th, with New Zealander Ryan Fox claiming the coveted Claret Jug.

angles.name: Golf Glory
angles.copy: Ryan Fox is the Champion Golfer of the Year! The Open Championship at Royal Birkdale delivered an incredible finish yesterday. What a performance! #TheOpen

angles.name: Weekend Recap
angles.copy: Still buzzing from The Open Championship? Ryan Fox lifted the Claret Jug after a thrilling final day at Royal Birkdale. Golf fans, what was your highlight?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK No.1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' remains at number one on the Official UK Singles Chart for the week of July 16-22, eyeing a record-breaking 18th week at the summit.

angles.name: Chart Reign
angles.copy: Still reigning supreme! 'Rein Me In' by Sam Fender & Olivia Dean holds onto the UK No.1 spot for another week. Can it make it 18?! #UKCharts

angles.name: Record Breaker
angles.copy: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean are making history! 'Rein Me In' is dominating the charts, now the longest-running British No.1 ever. What's your favourite track from them?

moments.title: UK Summer School Holidays Kick Off
moments.blurb: The long-awaited summer school holidays are officially beginning this week for millions of children across England and Wales, marking the start of a six-week break.

angles.name: Freedom!
angles.copy: Bags packed, alarms off! ☀️ Summer holidays are officially here for many schools across the UK. Wishing all students a fantastic break!

angles.name: School's Out
angles.copy: That's it for another academic year! Summer holidays have begun in England & Wales. What are your big plans for the next six weeks?

moments.title: Royal Welsh Show Underway
moments.blurb: The prestigious Royal Welsh Show, one of Europe's largest agricultural events, is taking place from July 20-23 in Builth Wells, celebrating Welsh farming and rural life.

angles.name: Welsh Heritage
angles.copy: The Royal Welsh Show has officially opened its gates in Builth Wells! Celebrating the best of Welsh agriculture, food, and culture until July 23rd. #RoyalWelshShow

angles.name: Day at the Show
angles.copy: Planning a visit to the Royal Welsh Show this week? From livestock displays to local produce, there's so much to see and do! What's your favourite part?

moments.title: BBC Proms 2026 Season Continues
moments.blurb: The world-renowned BBC Proms classical music festival is in full swing at the Royal Albert Hall, running from July 17th to September 12th with a focus on American music this year.

angles.name: Classical Summer
angles.copy: The sound of summer! 🎶 The BBC Proms are bringing world-class classical music to the Royal Albert Hall until September. Have you caught a performance yet?

angles.name: Proms in London
angles.copy: Experience the magic of the Proms! The Royal Albert Hall is buzzing with incredible concerts as the BBC Proms continue. A truly iconic British summer event.

moments.title: Bruno Mars Continues London Stadium Shows
moments.blurb: Pop superstar Bruno Mars is continuing his series of massive stadium shows in London this week, with dates on July 22nd, 24th, and 25th.

angles.name: 24K Magic Live
angles.copy: Still got tickets for Bruno Mars this week? The '24K Magic' man is bringing the funk to London Stadium on July 22, 24 & 25! Get ready to dance!

angles.name: London Calling Bruno
angles.copy: Bruno Mars is owning London this week with his string of stadium shows. If you're heading to one, prepare for an unforgettable night!

moments.title: Limehouse Lizzy Live in Exeter
moments.blurb: Acclaimed Thin Lizzy tribute band Limehouse Lizzy are set to perform at Exeter Phoenix on July 24th, delivering classic rock hits to Devon fans.

angles.name: Thin Lizzy Tribute
angles.copy: Don't miss Limehouse Lizzy at Exeter Phoenix on July 24th! Get ready for a night of classic Thin Lizzy anthems. #ExeterGigs

angles.name: Devon Rock Night
angles.copy: Calling all rock fans in Devon! Limehouse Lizzy are bringing the house down at Exeter Phoenix this Thursday. Who's going?

moments.title: Wales Airshow Returns to Swansea Bay
moments.blurb: The spectacular Wales Airshow will take to the skies over Swansea Bay on Saturday, July 25th and Sunday, July 26th, promising breathtaking aerial displays.

angles.name: Airshow Thrills
angles.copy: Get ready for some aerial acrobatics! The Wales Airshow returns to Swansea Bay this weekend, July 25-26. Who's excited for the displays? #WalesAirshow

angles.name: Weekend in Swansea
angles.copy: Making plans for the weekend? The Wales Airshow is a must-see event in Swansea Bay, with incredible action in the skies. Don't forget your camera!

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: The iconic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Sir Mick Jagger, will celebrate his 83rd birthday on Saturday, July 26th.

angles.name: Rock Legend's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger this Saturday! Still moving like Jagger after all these years. What's your favourite Stones track? #MickJagger

angles.name: Still Got The Moves
angles.copy: It's Mick Jagger's birthday on July 26th! The ultimate rock and roll showman turns 83. Here's to many more years of iconic performances.

moments.title: Supreme Queen Tribute in Exeter
moments.blurb: Catch the highly-rated Queen tribute band Supreme Queen at Exeter Corn Exchange on Thursday, July 30th, performing classic hits from the rock legends.

angles.name: Queen in Exeter
angles.copy: We Will Rock You! Supreme Queen are bringing their incredible tribute show to Exeter Corn Exchange on July 30th. Don't miss out on a night of Freddie magic! #ExeterMusic

angles.name: Devon's Night at the Opera
angles.copy: Relive the glory of Queen with Supreme Queen live in Exeter on July 30th. Grab your tickets for a spectacular show at the Corn Exchange!

moments.title: Kate Bush's 68th Birthday
moments.blurb: Groundbreaking British singer-songwriter Kate Bush, known for her unique artistry and hits like 'Wuthering Heights', celebrates her 68th birthday on July 30th.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Queen
angles.copy: Happy 68th Birthday to the one and only Kate Bush this July 30th! An artist who truly runs up that hill, defying expectations with every note. #KateBush

angles.name: Birthday for an Enigma
angles.copy: Celebrating the extraordinary talent of Kate Bush on her 68th birthday! Her influence on music is undeniable. What's your favourite Kate Bush song?
